feed.text: Antman, Red, Misty, and Bill entered the S.S. Anne cargo hold after Blue's battle cleared the main deck.
Red recovered a Rocket cargo manifest listing false passenger names and off-book crates.
Bill found a hidden Nexus Order symbol on one crate, implying Rocket is not the only force using the ship.
Bill decoded the cargo timestamps and matched them to the earlier WorldLink network pulse.
Misty noticed the lower-deck waterline is unstable, as if something heavy was moved recently.
Red guarded the cargo stairs so Antman could search without Rocket trapping the team below deck.
The cargo manifest points toward the Captain's cabin and the Trail Cutter prototype.
